query: SELECT ticker, entryPrice, currentPrice, currentSl, currentTp, unrealizedPnl, unrealizedPnlPct, units, openedAt, status FROM paperPositions WHERE ticker = 'MP' AND status = 'open' ORDER BY openedAt DESC LIMIT 3;
